rss.title: EPRI launches new large load framework to reduce time to power for data centers
rss.snippet: EPRI is launching Flex MOSAIC, a framework for large electric loads, developed with 65 utilities and tech providers, to improve data center power access and grid reliability.

rss.title: Trump administration to pay French company $1B to walk away from US offshore wind leases
rss.snippet: The Trump administration will pay $1 billion to TotalEnergies to cancel two offshore wind leases in North Carolina and New York.

rss.title: Record heat, melting snow: What does it mean for California’s reservoirs?
rss.snippet: California faces a record heat wave impacting its Sierra Nevada snowpack, now at 38% of average for mid-March, complicating water storage.
